info.title: ShopSphere API
info.description: ShopSphere is a production-ready e-commerce platform. This API provides endpoints for product browsing, shopping cart management, wishlist, order processing, and user authentication.

post.description: Create a new customer account and return an API token.
Authenticate a user and return an API token.
Revoke the current API token. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile data.

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information including avatar.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's shopping cart with items and totals.

post.description: Add a product to the shopping cart or increase its quantity if already present.

put.description: Update the quantity of a product in the cart.

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the shopping cart.
Remove all items from the shopping cart.

get.description: Returns a list of all active product categories.
Returns a single category by its URL slug.

post.description: Place a new order with the items currently in the cart. Requires authentication.
Subscribe an email address to the ShopSphere newsletter.

get.description: Returns a list of all orders placed by the authenticated user.
Returns detailed information about a specific order, including items and shipping.
Returns a paginated list of products. Supports filtering, sorting, and searching.
Returns detailed product information including gallery images, category, and rating.
Returns a list of featured products.
Returns the most recently added products.
Returns the top-selling products based on order history.
Search for products by name, description, or other attributes.
Returns products belonging to a specific category.
Returns all reviews for a specific product.

post.description: Submit or update a review for a product. Users can only submit one review per product.

get.description: Returns all products in the authenticated user's wishlist.

post.description: Add a product to the wishlist if not present, or remove it if already present.

delete.description: Remove a specific product from the wishlist.

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

Cart.description: Shopping cart with items and summary

avatar.description: Avatar image file (jpg, png, webp, max 2MB)

sanctum.description: Enter your Sanctum token. Get it from POST /api/login or /api/register.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Register, login, logout, and manage your account

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Place orders and view order history
